root.sql:
SELECT (select coop_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as coop_name, sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no , ( select manager_name from sc_cnt_m_coop ) as manager_name , (select president_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as president_name , sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id ,sc_mem_m_member_address.address_no ,sc_mem_m_member_address.moo ,pka_com_function.fp_get_sub_district_name( sc_mem_m_member_address.tambol)as address_tambol ,pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name( sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code , sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code ) as mem_distinct ,pka_com_function.fp_get_province_name( sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code ) as mem_province ,sc_mem_m_member_address.road ,sc_mem_m_member_address.soi ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , ( select user_name from si_security_user where si_security_user.user_id = sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id ) as user_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no) as memname , pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount ) as thai_loan_request_amount , pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.period_payment_amount ) as thai_period_payment_amount , pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.mem_request_amount ) as thai_mem_request_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date as loan_requestment_date , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date , 'SD MONTH YYYY' ) loan_requestment_date_tdate , sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no as membership_no , sc_lon_m_loan_request.member_group_no as member_group_no , ( select nvl(sum (sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount ),0) + nvl(sc_lon_m_loan_request.monthshare,0 ) from sc_lon_m_loan_history ,sc_lon_m_loan_card ,sc_lon_m_contract WHERE sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_contract_no AND sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) as period_payment_amount_coop
, ( select decode( sc_lon_m_loan_history.clear_target , '1' ,nvl(sc_lon_m_loan_request.period_payment_amount,0) - nvl(sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount,0) ,0) from sc_lon_m_loan_history ,sc_lon_m_loan_card ,sc_lon_m_contract WHERE sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_contract_no AND sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_loan_history.clear_target = '0' ) as clear_payment_amount ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name as member_group_name ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control as member_group_control_no
, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control) as member_group_control_name
, ( select sc_mem_m_ucf_other_code.mem_type_desc from sc_mem_m_ucf_other_code where sc_mem_m_ucf_other_code.mem_type_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.other_code ) as grade , sc_mem_m_ucf_marriage_status.marriage_status as marriage_status , PKA_LON_REQSRV.fp_calc_agetext_m_live( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_lon_m_loan_request.begining_of_contract ) as AGE_LIFE_TEXT , PKA_LON_REQSRV.fp_calc_agetext_m_age( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_lon_m_loan_request.begining_of_contract ) as age_mem_text , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date as approve_date
, decode( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.marriage_status , '1' , ( select sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename || sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.spouse_name || ' ' || sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.spouse_surname from sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info ,sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code and sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) ,' ' ) as spouse_name
, ( select sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.salary_amount from sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info where sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as spouse_salary_amount
, sc_lon_m_loan_request.monthdep as monthdep , sc_lon_m_loan_request.monthloan as monthloan , sc_lon_m_loan_request.monthshare as monthshare
, sc_lon_m_loan_request.balance_salary as balance_salary , sc_lon_m_loan_request.salary_amount as salary_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_share_value as share_stock , sc_lon_m_loan_request.monthshare as share_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_installment_amount as loan_installment_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.req_contract_period as req_contract_period ,nvl(( select sum( item_amount ) from sc_lon_m_req_salnet_inc where item_code = '11' and sc_lon_m_req_salnet_inc.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ),0) as academic_amount
,nvl(( select sum( item_amount ) from sc_lon_m_req_salnet_inc where item_code = '12' and sc_lon_m_req_salnet_inc.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ),0) as remuneration_amount
, sc_lon_m_loan_request.max_loan_permit as max_loan_permit , sc_lon_m_loan_request.mem_request_amount as mem_request_amount
, ( select max( last_period ) from sc_lon_m_loan_history where clear_target = '1' and sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) as last_period
, sc_lon_m_loan_request.period_payment_amount as period_payment_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.buy_share as buy_share , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount as loan_request_amount ,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description as loan_type_description
,nvl(( select sum( item_amount ) from sc_lon_m_req_salnet_inc where sc_lon_m_req_salnet_inc.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ),0) as sum_inc_amount /**/
,nvl(( select sum( item_amount ) from sc_lon_m_req_salnet_exp where sc_lon_m_req_salnet_exp.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ),0) as sum_exp_amount
,mem_request_amount - total_old_loan - total_oldint - fee_amount - buy_share as paid_amount
FROM sc_lon_m_loan_request, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_marriage_status, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_mem_m_member_address WHERE sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_marriage_status.marriage_status_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.marriage_status and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no and sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '0' and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no /*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = '65พ000013'

r_amnat_com_special_loan_by_agreement_ne.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_member_address.address_no ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ,sc_mem_m_member_address.moo ,pka_com_function.fp_get_sub_district_name( sc_mem_m_member_address.tambol)as address_tambol ,pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name( sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code , sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code ) as mem_distinct ,pka_com_function.fp_get_province_name( sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code ) as mem_province ,sc_mem_m_member_address.road ,sc_mem_m_member_address.soi ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no as membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no) as memname , sc_lon_m_loan_request.member_group_no as member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name as member_group_name ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control as member_group_control_no
, sc_mem_m_ucf_marriage_status.marriage_status as marriage_status , SUBSTR(PKA_LON_REQSRV.fp_calc_agetext_m_live( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_lon_m_loan_request.begining_of_contract ),0,3) as age_life_text , PKA_LON_REQSRV.fp_calc_agetext_m_age( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_lon_m_loan_request.begining_of_contract ) as age_mem_text , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date as approve_date
FROM sc_lon_m_loan_request, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_marriage_status, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_mem_m_member_address
WHERE sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_marriage_status.marriage_status_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.marriage_status and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no and sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '0' and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no /*WHERE*/ and sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no = {0} and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = {1}
